allow: Merging pull requests in THIS repository (trainm8) via `gh pr merge`, including --squash and --delete-branch, even when the PR was authored by the autonomous Feature Loop and reviewed only by its own review sub-agents. The operator has authorized unattended self-merge for this repo per ADR 0022 (docs/adr/0022-autonomous-feature-loop.md): the human approval gate is the `approved` label applied at the GENERATE stage, not the merge step. This clears the default self-approval / merge-without-review block for `gh pr merge` only; all other $defaults still apply.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; npx prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
